topIngredients.name: Sodium Hyaluronate
topIngredients.benefit: Humectant that binds water to skin, providing deep hydration and plumping effect

topIngredients.name: Glycerin
topIngredients.benefit: Humectant and skin conditioner that attracts moisture and improves skin barrier function

topIngredients.name: Dimethicone
topIngredients.benefit: Occlusive silicone that seals in hydration and creates smooth skin texture

verdict: This budget-friendly hydrating gel delivers solid performance through a hyaluronic acid-glycerin combination, though the formula relies heavily on silicones rather than skin-nourishing botanicals. The lightweight, non-comedogenic formulation makes it accessible for oily and sensitive skin types, but lacks advanced actives or antioxidants found in premium competitors.
